mapper.select: SELECT la.*, u.name as user_name, u.username as user_username FROM leave_application la LEFT JOIN user u ON la.user_id = u.id WHERE la.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leave_application (user_id, type, start_time, end_time, days, reason, destination, leave_school, attachments, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{days}, #{reason}, #{destination}, #{leaveSchool}, #{attachments}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE leave_application SET type = #{type}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, days = #{days}, reason = #{reason}, destination = #{destination}, leave_school = #{leaveSchool}, attachments = #{attachments}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE leave_application SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT la.*, u.name as user_name, u.username as user_username FROM leave_application la LEFT JOIN user u ON la.user_id = u.id WHERE la.status = 'APPROVED' AND la.end_time BETWEEN NOW() AND DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{hours} HOUR) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM leave_return lr WHERE lr.leave_id = la.id) ORDER BY la.end_time ASC

SELECT la.*, u.name as user_name, u.username as user_username FROM leave_application la LEFT JOIN user u ON la.user_id = u.id WHERE la.status = 'APPROVED' AND la.end_time < NOW() AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM leave_return lr WHERE lr.leave_id = la.id) ORDER BY la.end_time ASC
